# LICENSE NOTE — Catalyst `components/`

Clean-room Catalyst-aesthetic TSX reimplementations written from the published docs at <https://catalyst.tailwindui.com/docs/>. Each file matches the documented prop surface (prop names, defaults, returned markup shape) but is original code.

**No TSX was extracted from the paid Catalyst package.** Only public docs were read. The Tailwind Labs neutral/zinc palette and the Headless UI primitives used here are MIT-licensed.

Contents (29 files): alert, auth-layout, avatar, badge, button, checkbox, combobox, description-list, dialog, divider, dropdown, fieldset, heading, input, link, listbox, navbar, pagination, radio, select, sheet, sidebar, sidebar-layout, stacked-layout, switch, table, text, textarea, toast.

Catalyst itself is sold under Tailwind Plus at <https://tailwindcss.com/plus/license>. If you ship Catalyst-derived code commercially, purchase the license.
